summary: Backend testing completed for GET /api/predios/ultima-manzana/{municipio} endpoint. All 9 tests passed. The endpoint correctly returns the last registered 'manzana' (block) for a specific sector, handles empty sectors (returns null), and validates municipio existence.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Endpoint GET /api/predios/ultima-manzana/{municipio} implemented correctly at line 4749
✓ Returns ultima_manzana, total_manzanas, total_predios_sector as specified
✓ Handles empty sectors correctly (returns ultima_manzana: null, total_predios_sector: 0)
✓ Validates municipio against MUNICIPIOS_DIVIPOLA catalog (returns 404 for invalid)
✓ El Carmen zona 01, sector 01 returns ultima_manzana='3026' with 47 manzanas and 2393 predios
context_for_next_testing_agent: GET /api/predios/ultima-manzana/{municipio} endpoint fully tested. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_ultima_manzana.py.
